---
title: "About"
image: ghc.jpeg                         #upload my image to my About Page
toc: false
about: 
    id: intro-heading                   #creates an ID to my content
    template: solana                  # gives a template to my image
    image-width: 20em                   # width
    image-shape: rectangle              # rectangle shape
    
format: 

  html: 
    theme: yeti                         #new theme for my about page
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
---
:::{#intro-heading}

Hi, I’m a Data Science and Statistics, and Quantitative Economics double major with a strong interest in using data to understand real-world problems and build meaningful solutions. I enjoy working at the intersection of computation, mathematics, and social impact, whether that’s through coding projects, data analysis, or visualization work.
This website is a collection of my projects, coursework, and experiments as I continue learning and growing in these fields. Each project reflects something I’ve explored, ranging from programming and algorithms to applied data science and analytical thinking.
I’m always curious to learn new tools, improve my technical skills, and connect ideas across disciplines. Feel free to explore my work and see what I’ve been building
